titleStmt.title: SII 23.436: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 436. (A.R. No. 436 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Rājasiṁhēśvara temple—on stones built into the walls of the maṇḍapa in front [Māṟ.]. Sundara-Pāṇḍya I: year 10: 1225-26 A.D.

summary.p: This is fragmentary containing only a part of the introduction of the king and of the subject matter. The latter seems to be a gift of land as dēvadāṉa to the goddess Tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai-Nāchchiyār Śāntāṇḍār after celebrating thē kalyāṇōtsava by Muduguḍināṭṭuvēḷāṉ Irāśiṅgan of Pāṇḍimaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṟattu poṉṉivaḷavaṉ Urimaiyuṭaṉ tāṉ pukuntu peṟṟa putalvaṉai niṉpeṟeṉṟuṭaṉ kāṭṭi veṟṟi Aravaṇaikkiḻ viḻuntu toḻutu Irappatā
ṅki viṭaikuṭuttu viṭṭaruḷi vākaikatirvel vaṭaventartam pātamekat taḻaiyaṇiya virakkaḻal paṇintu viḷaṅkiya maṇimuṭi virasiṅhāsaṉattu vaḷaṅkeḻukava
tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī coṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya cuntara pāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10vatu ci pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu mutukuṭi nāṭṭuveḷāṉ Irāciṅkan
daśiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attatti nāḷ tiruppaḷḷi yaṟai nācciyār cāntāṇṭāṟait tirukkalliyāṇam paṇṇiviccut tevatāṉamākak kuṭuttut tiruccūla
kkum vaṭavellai paṇṇaikkut teṉṉācaṟutip peruvāykkā lukkut teṟkum Ipperunāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilattil patiṉāṟaṭic kolāl tevatāṉam nila
The following six lines, in slightly different characters are found in the intervening slab.

—yil loḷiya vaṇperump pūṅkamala vāvicer poṉ—
—ṅkaiyakal tāṉotakam paṇṇi taṇṭārmuṭi Uṭaṉe—
—leṉa muḻaṅkutaṉi nalliyāṉai vaṭapuliventar ma—
—ṇikkaṉ civallavaṉāṉa kulaicekarak kaṭattirukkaik kā—
—lampi Ivvūṟ kiḻakkuc cāntanerik kuḷakkiḻt te—
—l Āṇṭār pukaliventaṟku maṭappuṟamāka kuṭutta nilam—
Digital edition of SII 23.436 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
